title: PaymentCreated v1
description: Emitted by payment-domain (via outbox) when a new payment is initiated and submitted for processing. Published to payments.lifecycle.v1.

schema_version.description: Monotonic integer version of this schema encoded as a string. Consumers MUST skip (and warn on) unknown versions.

message_id.description: Globally unique message identifier. Used as idempotency key by consumers (inbox/dedup pattern).

correlation_id.description: Propagated across all services in the same business transaction. Set once at the transaction boundary.

causation_id.description: message_id of the upstream message that caused this one. Omitted at the start of a causal chain.

occurred_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the event occurred (not published). Must include timezone (Z or offset).

payment_id.description: Authoritative payment identifier owned by payment-domain.

merchant_id.description: Identifier of the merchant who initiated the payment.

provider_id.description: External payment provider selected for this payment.

provider_reference.description: Provider's own transaction identifier. Absent on payment.initiated (not yet assigned).

value.description: Amount in minor currency units (e.g. 9999 = $99.99 USD).

status.description: Payment status at the time this event was emitted.

idempotency_key.description: Merchant-supplied idempotency key from the original payment request.
